description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a black plastic or metal handle and lever mechanism at the top. A black hose with a yellow tip is attached near the top and loops down the side, secured by a black band around the cylinder. The front features a large, white instructional label with red and black text, providing clear usage directions. The extinguisher has a visible safety pin at the top, ensuring it is not accidentally discharged. The surface appears slightly worn, indicating practical use in urban environments such as garages, hallways, or public buildings.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black handle, hose, and a prominent instructional label on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, handle, hose, and safety pin clearly.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the plain red back and the top-mounted handle and safety pin.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the black hose and the smooth red cylinder.
description_view_3: Back view with the hose running vertically and the label partially visible on the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white rectangular instructional label with red and black text on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached near the top, looping down the side, with a yellow tip and secured by a black band.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Silver safety pin visible at the top near the handle.
